summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Nuclear Physics and Radioactivity is a key topic in Modern Physics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of nuclear physics and radioactivity.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding nuclear physics and radioactivity has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
